templates.template: Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP
templates.name: Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP
templates.description:
This template is designed to monitor Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP.
It works without any external scripts and uses the script item.

Setup:
  1. Create an Azure service principal via the Azure command-line interface (Azure CLI) for your subscription.
    `az ad sp create-for-rbac --name zabbix --role reader --scope /subscriptions/<subscription_id>`
    See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/create-an-azure-service-principal-azure-cli for more details.
  2. Link the template to a host.
  3. Configure the macros: {$AZURE.APP.ID}, {$AZURE.PASSWORD}, {$AZURE.TENANT.ID}, {$AZURE.SUBSCRIPTION.ID}, and {$AZURE.RESOURCE.ID}.

You can discuss this template or leave feedback on our forum https://www.zabbix.com/forum/zabbix-suggestions-and-feedback/

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"
templates.readme:
## Overview

This template is designed to monitor Microsoft Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP.
It works without any external scripts and uses the script item.

## Setup

1. Create an Azure service principal via the Azure command-line interface (Azure CLI) for your subscription.

      `az ad sp create-for-rbac --name zabbix --role reader --scope /subscriptions/<subscription_id>`

> See [Azure documentation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/create-an-azure-service-principal-azure-cli) for more details.

2. Link the template to a host.
3. Configure the host wizard configuration fields: `Azure App ID`, `Azure password`, `Azure tenant ID`, `Azure subscription ID`, and `Azure SQL managed instance ID`.

items.name: Availability status detailed
items.description: The summary description of the availability status.

items.name: Availability state
items.description:
The availability status of the resource.
0 - Available - no events detected that affect the health of the resource.
1 - Degraded  - your resource detected a loss in performance, although it's still available for use.
2 - Unavailable - the service detected an ongoing platform or non-platform event that affects the health of the resource.
3 - Unknown - Resource Health hasn't received information about the resource for more than 10 minutes.

triggers.expression: last(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.availability.state)=1
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Azure SQL managed instance is degraded
triggers.description: The resource is in a degraded state.

triggers.expression: last(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.availability.state)=3
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Azure SQL managed instance is in unknown state

triggers.expression: last(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.availability.state)=2
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Azure SQL managed instance is unavailable

items.name: IO bytes read
items.description: Bytes read by the managed instance.

items.name: IO bytes write
items.description: Bytes written by the managed instance.

triggers.expression: change(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.collation)=1
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Instance collation has changed
triggers.description: Azure SQL managed instance collation has changed.

items.name: Virtual core count
items.description: Virtual core count available to the managed instance.

items.name: Average CPU utilization
items.description: Average CPU utilization of the instance.

triggers.expression: min(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.cpu, 10m)>={$AZURE.SQL.INST.CPU.CRIT}
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Critically high CPU utilization
triggers.event_name: Azure SQL instance: Critically high CPU utilization: (over >= {$AZURE.SQL.INST.CPU.CRIT}% over last 10m)

dependencies.name: Azure SQL instance: High CPU utilization
dependencies.expression: min(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.cpu, 10m)>={$AZURE.SQL.INST.CPU.WARN}

triggers.expression: min(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.cpu, 10m)>={$AZURE.SQL.INST.CPU.WARN}
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: High CPU utilization
triggers.event_name: Azure SQL instance: High CPU utilization: (over >= {$AZURE.SQL.INST.CPU.WARN}% over last 10m)

items.name: Get errors
items.description: A list of errors from API requests.

triggers.expression: length(last(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.data.errors))>0
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: There are errors in requests to API
triggers.description: Zabbix has received errors in response to API requests.

items.name: Get data
items.description: Gathers data of the Azure SQL managed instance.

items.name: Instance provisioning state
items.description: Provisioning state of the managed instance.

parameters:
const idx = {
	'Unknown': 0,
	'Accepted': 1,
	'Canceled': 2,
	'Created': 3,
	'Creating': 4,
	'Deleted': 5,
	'Deleting': 6,
	'Failed': 7,
	'NotSpecified': 8,
	'Registering': 9,
	'Running': 10,
	'Succeeded': 11,
	'TimedOut': 12,
	'Unrecognized': 13,
	'Updating': 14
};

return typeof idx[value] === 'undefined' ? 0 : idx[value];

triggers.expression: change(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.provision)<>0
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Instance provisioning state has changed
triggers.description: Azure SQL managed instance provisioning state has changed.

items.name: IO request count
items.description: IO request count by the managed instance.

triggers.expression: change(/Azure SQL Managed Instance by HTTP/azure.sql_inst.state)=1
triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Instance state has changed
triggers.description: Azure SQL managed instance state has changed.

items.name: Storage space reserved
items.description: Storage space reserved by the managed instance.

items.name: Storage space used
items.description: Storage space used by the managed instance.

items.name: Storage space utilization
items.description: Managed instance storage space utilization, in percent.

triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Storage free space is critically low
triggers.event_name: Azure SQL instance: The free storage space is critically low (below {$AZURE.SQL.INST.SPACE.CRIT}% for 5m)
triggers.description: The free storage space has been less than `{$AZURE.SQL.INST.SPACE.CRIT}`% for 5m.

dependencies.name: Azure SQL instance: Storage free space is low

triggers.name: Azure SQL instance: Storage free space is low
triggers.event_name: Azure SQL instance: The free storage space is low (below {$AZURE.SQL.INST.SPACE.WARN}% for 5m)
triggers.description: The free storage space has been less than `{$AZURE.SQL.INST.SPACE.WARN}`% for 5m.

macros.description: The App ID of Microsoft Azure.
Sets the HTTP proxy value. If this macro is empty, then no proxy is used.

config.description: HTTP proxy to use for requests.

config.description: Storage space warning threshold, expressed in %. In the range from 0 to 100 inclusive.
